marketFinding: B.TECH has very few black fully-auto top-load washers in true 7-9 kg; most black inventory is 11-20 kg. Main shortlist is 3 models; adjacent list for size flex.

workingRecommendation.strict_7_9_black: Sharp ES-TN09GDSP 9kg black ~13.5k — still #1 when black preferred
workingRecommendation.strict_7_9_any_color: Toshiba AW-M801 / AW-J900 silver ~9.7–12.4k strong value if color flex
workingRecommendation.if_flex_size_for_inverter: LG 13kg black inverter T1388 ~19.5k or Toshiba 13kg silver inv ~18.2k
workingRecommendation.ui: washer-gallery.html — Black only preset + Color dropdown

expandPass.note: Deep top-load category scrape (~138 sitewide); 87 full-auto 7–15kg kept. Gallery defaults to All.
